item.title: Genentech DME Campaign
item.description:
• Summary: Genentech, a member of the Roche Group, has launched a new marketing campaign for diabetic macular edema (DME) featuring comedian Damon Wayans. The humor-laden campaign aims to raise awareness about DME and encourage patients to seek treatment. While specific products are not highlighted, Genentech markets anti-VEGF therapies for DME, such as Lucentis and Vabysmo. The campaign focuses on patient education and the importance of regular eye exams.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma
